rule_catalog.description: Each requirement should have source evidence or be derived from a requirement with source evidence.
Each SYS.2 requirement should be linked to a stakeholder requirement or approved stakeholder source.
Each SYS.2 requirement should be linked downstream to architecture, software requirement, or verification artifact.
Each SWE.1 requirement should be linked to an upstream SYS.2 requirement.
Each verifiable requirement should define verification criteria.
Each SYS.2 requirement should be verified by at least one linked SYS.5 test case or equivalent verification artifact.
Requirements should have a defined review state.
Safety relevance should be classified as Yes or No before approval.
Safety-relevant requirements should be reviewed before approval.
SYS.2 requirements should preserve the intent of upstream stakeholder requirements.
SWE.1 requirements should implement the behavior defined by linked SYS.2 requirements without changing its meaning.
Test cases should verify the behavior and conditions specified in linked SYS.2 requirements.
